description: Parse the user request to extract the number for factorial calculation and generate the appropriate function call JSON

inputs.name: user_request
inputs.description: The user's request text containing the number to calculate factorial for

output.description: Returns a list containing a single dict with the function call structure: [{"math.factorial": {"number": [5]}}] where the number value is extracted from the user request

workflow_spec.name: Calculate Factorial with JSON Function Call
workflow_spec.description: Parse user query to extract number and generate appropriate math.factorial function call in JSON format
